titleStmt.title: SII 24.237: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 237. (A.R. No. 95 of 1937-38.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Registers a sale of land to the bhaṭṭas of Kōdaṇḍarāma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam by Ālikkoṉṟai Dēvarāja-Bhaṭṭa of Nāgalamahādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam an agrahāra in Viḷā-nāḍu, a sub-division of Pāṇḍikulapati-vaḷanāḍu. The record is dated in the 2+1st year (vide No. 230 of the king's reign) and the details of the date i.e., Mēsha, ba. 11 Sunday, Uttiraṭṭādi correspond regularly to A.D. 1316, April 18, f.d.t. ·09; f.d.n. ·83. The king's name Jaṭāvarmaṉ seems to be wrongly quoted for Māṟavarmaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koṟcaṭapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī kulacekara tevaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu Etirāmāṇṭu meṣanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu Ekādaśiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭātināḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulapati vaḷanāṭṭu viḷā nāṭṭu koyilakaram śrī mannāgalamahādeviccaturvedimaṅkalattu Ālikkoṉṟai devarājabhaṭṭaṉeṉ nila vilai pramāṇam koyilakaram śrīkodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedi maṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku Iṟṟaināḷāl nāṉ viṟṟukkuṭutta maṉainilamāvatu
Iṉṉāgalamahādeviccaturvedimaṅkalattut teṟkil teruvil naṭuvaṭaiya Eṉṉutāṉa maṉai ner tirumuṭikkuṟaip peruvaḻiyile yuṟa naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa nilattil śrī senā- patip peruvilaiyāka ṉāṉ koṇṭa vāstu śeṣamāna nilattil Ikkotaṇḍarāma ccaturvedimaṅkalattu vaṭakkil teruvil vaṭaciṟakilakappaṭṭa vāl niḷattu kollai Oṉpatiṉ kolukku Uṭpaṭṭa kuḻi pattum viṟṟukuṭuttuk koḷvatāna Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu vaḻaṅku nallirāci 6 U Ippaṇam Āṟukkum Ikkuḻi pa
ttum viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ kodaṇḍarāmaccaturvetimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku devarāja bhaṭṭaṉeṉ Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta Ikkuḻi pattilum melṉokkiṉa maraṅkaḷum kiḻṉokkiṉa kiṇaṟukaḷum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa samastaprāptikaḷum Uṭpaṭa viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ kotaṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku devarājabhaṭṭa ṉeṉ Ippaṭi Ikkuḻi pattukkum pramāṇappaṭi mulyamāna paṇam Āṟum Ikkodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷil komaṭattu Utbāhu sundarabhaṭṭaṉ pakkalile Iṟṟaināḷile paṟṟikkoḷḷu
kaiyil Ituve dravyaccelavu kaiyyiṭāvatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ koyilakaram kodaṇḍa rāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku śrīmannāgalamahādevi ccaturvedimaṅkalattu Ālikkoṉṟai devarāja bhaṭṭaṉeṉ Ikkuḻi pattum Ippaṇam Āṟukkum viṟṟukkuṭuttamaikku Ivai Ālikkoṉṟai devarājabhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu § Ivarkaḷ Apekṣikka Ipramāṇam Eḻutiṉamaikku Ivai śrī kulottuṅkacoḻa
ccaturvedimaṅkalattu komaṭattu śrīrāmabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu . § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tirumaḻalai nārāyaṇa bhaṭṭaṉeṉ U
Digital edition of SII 24.237 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
